title: Read, interpret and apply engineering drawings
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Read, interpret and apply engineering drawings demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Workplace instructions are used to determine job requirements1.2 Hazards are recognised and precautions are taken according to safety requirements1.3 Engineering drawings are sourced that relate to the vehicle or equipment being repaired, manufactured or modified 1.4 Engineering drawings are checked to ensure they are current and include latest amendments

elements.title: Read and interpret engineering drawings

pcs.text: Symbols, codes, legends and diagrams in engineering drawings are identified and interpreted2.2 Technical information, material specifications, finishes, dimensions and tolerances are identified and interpreted2.3 Product, system and components represented by the drawing are identified and interpreted
